entry.title: Add First Ronda Picture
entry.summary: It took some time, but finally I was able to add a picture from iPhone to my
entry.content:
It took some time, but finally I was able to add a picture from iPhone to my website:
https://nikolaiaristov.com/docs/spain/ronda

🖼️ This is a great achievement, proving end-to-end workflow for website picture upload.

Accomplishments​

Cloudinary Embed​

https://github.com/KodiStudios/cloudinary-embed

  • End-to-End Picture Support The Cloudinary Embed project allows users to upload pictures from their local SSD to Cloudinary service. Once a picture is on Cloudinary, it can be referenced by your website! So now we have full end-to-end support for picture upload from iPhone to Website.

Nikolai Aristov Website​

https://nikolaiaristov.com

  • 🖼️ Blog with Picture
    From iPhone to Blog, first end-to-end workflow
    Example:
    https://nikolaiaristov.com/docs/spain/ronda

Next Effort​

Personal Site https://aristov.net​

  • 🎈 Align DNS Settings
    Need to switch https://aristov.net to point to https://nikolaiaristov.com
    This will allow full merge.
    Also, need to consider:
    https://aristov.eu

Kodi Studios Website https://kodistudios.com​

  • 🐝 Incorporate Best Practices 2026
    There are still a few improvements that can be done to really make Kodi Studios shine. They also include some cleanup and will make it even easier to further make Kodi Studios awesome!

entry.title: Simplify Blog Workflow for Kodi Studios Website
entry.summary: Kodi Studios is an old website, it has gone through multiple iterations. Some
entry.content:
Kodi Studios is an old website, it has gone through multiple iterations. Some were more successful than others. Started off with WordPress, then moved to more modern and sustainable solutions like Docusaurus. It really takes an effort to get website to good condition. However, if approached one step at a time, this big effort can be fully achieved.

One lesson is to not get overwhelmed. Tech stack changes every other year, but as long as you keep and control your content, you have the power to migrate, transform it.

Don't be afraid to start new website, even in 2026 with social media all around. Social media basically controls what it shows and what it doesn't. Your own website is your own presence on internet.

Accomplishments​

Kodi Studios Website https://kodistudios.com​

  • 🖼️ Blog
    Migrated to new blogging pattern that removes noise and allows creator to concentrate on blog content and message.
    One of core improvements is enabling markdown formatting, which improves readability not only for rendered blog pages, but also for original source markdown files. Super Excited for this improvement.
    Blogging can become a pleasant zen activity, rather than a battle with formatting utilities.
  • ⛵ Linters
    Added Linters and other Best Practices into Kodi Studios website. It should make it easier to maintain, update.

Next Effort​

Personal Site https://aristov.net​

  • 🎈 Align DNS Settings
    Need to switch https://aristov.net to point to https://nikolaiaristov.com
    This will allow full merge.
    Also, need to consider:
    https://aristov.eu

Kodi Studios Website https://kodistudios.com​

  • 🐝 Incorporate Best Practices 2026
    There are still few improvements that still can be done to really make Kodi Studios shine. They also include some cleanup and will make it even easier to futher make Kodi Studios awesome!

entry.title: Switch Images to Cloudinary
entry.summary: Finally found replacement of OneDrive with Cloudinary.
entry.content:
Finally found replacement of OneDrive with Cloudinary.

Accomplishments​

Images Research​

  • 🖼️ Cloudinary
    Created end-to-end Image solution for WebSites using Cloudinary. So far, I'm impressed with Cloudinary speed and ease of configuration. Hopefully, it will be a nice solution for WebSite Images and other assets.
    New Cloudinary asset manager scripts are available at:
    https://github.com/KodiStudios/cloudinary-embed

Personal Site https://nikolaiaristov.com​

  • 🖼️ Add Personal Picture onto lifestyle site:
    https://nikolaiaristov.com

  • 📖 Improved Getting Started Documentation
    Includes Development.md and ReadMe.md

  • 🌉 Switched from PnP to Node Modules
    This will help with future project maintenance Yarn V4 Node Modules makes it easier for IDE Editors and other utilities to manage the project

  • 🌇 Switched End Line setting
    Minor, but important so that repo can work well on all platforms, including Windows and macOS

Next Effort​

Personal Site https://aristov.net​

  • 🎈 Align DNS Settings
    Need to switch https://aristov.net to point to https://nikolaiaristov.com

    This will allow full merge.
    Also, need to consider:
    https://aristov.eu

entry.title: Upload New Images
entry.summary: It turns out that OneDrive is rather slow to display images through shared URLs.
entry.content:
It turns out that OneDrive is rather slow to display images through shared URLs. Thus, I ventured onto journey to find alternatives to OneDrive.

Accomplishments​

Images Research​

  • 🖼️ Cloudify
    After real world testing of OneDrive as image provider through URLs, it turned out that OneDrive is extremely slow. Like it takes about 5 seconds to load a single image. Started to explore other providers. One promising solution is Cloudify. However, during my research, I ran out of VsCode Copilot Credits 😅 Which just shows how important AI utilities have become nowadays.

Next Effort​

Personal Site https://aristov.net​

  • 🖼️ Add Personal Picture onto lifestyle site:
    https://aristov.net

entry.title: Update OneDrive Embed Project
entry.summary: Of course a nice website needs to have great content, not only text but
entry.content:
Of course a nice website needs to have great content, not only text but pictures. For personal website https://nikolaiaristov.com there needs to be a way to store pictures for it.

One of answers is OneDrive Embed Script. It allows users to store pictures on OneDrive and then reference them from their website.

Accomplishments​

OneDrive Embed Script​

  • 🖼️ Updated OneDrive Embed Project
    Tons of goodness, updated yarn, linting, TypeScript, testing
    Updated to use latest and greatest patterns
    Added OneDrive Api Integration test
    This allows to easily verify OneDrive Embed Script

Next Effort​

Personal Site https://nikolaiaristov.com​

  • 🖼️ Add Personal Picture onto lifestyle site:
    https://nikolaiaristov.com

Picturethrill App​

  • 🐣 New Picturethrill App Version
    Release to Kodi Studios Website

  • 📈 Updates
    Update Picturethrill App to 2026

entry.title: New Nikolai Aristov Website
entry.summary: Lots of great progress around Kodi Studios. Recently, created new lifestyle
entry.content:
Lots of great progress around Kodi Studios. Recently, created new lifestyle personal website:
https://nikolaiaristov.com

Accomplishments​

Metro Evolved Website​

  • 🖼️ Updated Docusaurus Instructions
    As part of creation of new website https://nikolaiaristov.com, also updated instructions on Docusaurus:
    https://metroevolved.com/docs/category/create-site

    Now it's easier more than ever to create low-cost websites

Tonivo App​

https://kodistudios.com/docs/tonivo

  • 🐣 Enabled Tonivo App on Lower Windows Versions
    Originally, Tonivo App was able to run only on most recent Windows. However, it would be nice to support to more Windows versions, including some older ones. This really increases users who can download and use Tonivo App. Now, all of the following versions are supported:
    • Windows 11
    • Windows 10
    • Windows 8
    • Windows 7

Next Effort​

Picturethrill App​

  • 🐣 New Picturethrill App Version
    Release to Kodi Studios Website

  • 📈 Updates
    Update Picturethrill App to 2026

  • 🖼️ Add Personal Picture onto lifestyle site:
    https://nikolaiaristov.com

entry.title: Enter New Year 2026
entry.summary: Welcome to a fresh new year at Kodi Studios. As we step into 2026 with the full
entry.content:
Welcome to a fresh new year at Kodi Studios. As we step into 2026 with the full momentum of AI, we are excited to roll out updates across both https://kodistudios.com and https://metroevolved.com. The latest version of the Tonivo App is now live, delivering even more value and delight for our users. We're looking forward to a year of amazing websites and inspiring apps. Here's to making 2026 a memorable year along with our users and community.

Accomplishments​

Kodi Studios Website​

  • 🛠️ Fixes
    Fixed Edit Links
    Fixed DNS
    Fixe Yaml Publish Pipeline

  • 📈 Updates
    Updated Kodi Studios Website to latest packages, including Docusaurus V3, TypeScript, Node.js, Yarn V4 etc.

Metro Evolved Website​

  • 🖼️ New Logo
    Created New Logo for MetroEvolved website

  • ⛵ New Content Entries
    Added Entries for DNS and Apple Magic Mouse on Windows

  • 🛠️ Fixes
    Fixed Website Layout

  • 📈 Updates
    Updated Kodi Studios Website to latest packages, including Docusaurus V3, TypeScript, Node.js, Yarn V4 etc.

Tonivo App​

  • 🐣 New Tonivo App Version
    Released new version of Tonivo Windows App and added download link to Kodi Studios website:
    https://kodistudios.com/docs/tonivo

  • 🎈 Single Exe
    Created option for Single Exe in Tonivo App
    Download it at:
    Tonivo.Desktop.exe

Next Effort​

Picturethrill App​

  • 🐣 New Picturethrill App Version
    Release to Kodi Studios Website

  • 📈 Updates
    Update Picturethrill App to 2026
